title: Create: Fox's Wings
description: A create mod that aims to add an early elytra and more items!
body:
# ABOUT

A create addon that aims to make Early-Game Transportation easier!

"Andesite rods" and "Phantom membrane" to craft your "Membrane component" get four of those and craft yourself your first elytra!

Isn't as sturdy as a normal elytra, but you can always upgrade your elytra to have a sturdier elytra!

(Just keep in mind you need to have an actual elytra from The End)


## WHAT IT ADDS:

Netherite elytra,
Brass elytra,
Iron elytra,
Andesite elytra,
Davincis wings,
Mechanical Elytra

## PLANNING TO ADD

(these might be removed)

A silly little boss,
Holy Axe

### Issues!

I don't have somewhere you can report issues yet but feel free to dm me over discord the issues you have! (until I open up a discord server)

Discord User: SirKillerFox
